supported_devices: fans, air conditioners, heaters, dehumidifiers, humidifiers, foggers, CO2 injection/extraction equipment, 2 banks of lights; controlled via 24 VDC relay boxes
port_types: 9x 24 VDC outputs, USB-B, EnviroSensor cable connection, reed switch alarm input
compatible_ec_fans: any mains-powered fan via 24 VDC relay box
compatible_lights: any mains-powered light bank via 24 VDC relay box
compatible_sensors: Bluelab EnviroSensor (temperature, humidity, CO2, light); optional: outside temperature sensor, lamp over-temperature sensor, intruder detection reed switch
compatible_humidifiers: any mains-powered humidifier or fogger via 24 VDC relay box
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 injection or extraction system via 24 VDC relay box
recommended_use_note: Commercial grow room climate management; controls temperature, humidity, CO2, and 2 light banks via 9 relay-driven output channels; effective for rooms up to 10×10 m; add second EnviroSensor for larger areas
uvp_notes: US retailer Green Thumb Depot lists complete kit at $2,200 USD; Canadian retailer Evergreen Botany lists at CAD $4,508. No EUR price found. Not listed on EU Bluelab store.
notes: Formerly Autogrow IntelliClimate; acquired by Bluelab portfolio via Excel Seeds acquisition. Wi-Fi requires optional Bluelab IntelliLink (USB accessory, sold separately; 2.4 GHz only). The 9 outputs are 24 VDC at 3 A per port (total limited by 24 V 2.5 A power supply); outputs drive relay boxes that switch mains-voltage equipment. Features Autolearn CO2 cycle optimisation, Autoset stage-based scheduling, and advanced rules engine. Supports dual EnviroSensor for areas larger than 10×10 m. USB to PC for data logging via IntelliGrow software. Fan control is on/off only via relay, not variable speed. Temp accuracy ±0.5°C, RH accuracy ±2%, CO2 accuracy ±50 ppm.
